python3 -c "
import csv
with open('/lustre/fast/fast/sgoel/forecasting/current_sim/final_runs_v37/opencode_aljazeeraQ12026v37_qwen36plus/26-05-02-00-01-06/agents/minimalHarness_qwen_qwen36-plus_001/workspace/market.csv') as f:
    reader = csv.DictReader(f)
    rows = list(reader)

for r in rows:
    rd = r.get('resolution_date','').strip()
    if rd and rd == '2026-02-25':
        print(f'QID: {r[\"qid\"]}')
        print(f'Title: {r[\"title\"]}')
        print(f'Background: {r[\"background\"][:300] if r[\"background\"] else \"N/A\"}')
        print('---')
"

QID: 415069
Title: Which country will host the next round of indirect US-Iran talks on Monday, March 2, 2026?
Background: Question Start Date: 2026-02-19. The United States and Iran are engaged in indirect negotiations over Iran's nuclear programme, and different rounds may be held in different countries.
---
QID: 422164
Title: Which university will say by February 28, 2026 that US immigration agents made misrepresentations to get into one of its student housing buildings?
Background: Question Start Date: 2026-01-31. Immigration enforcement actions at colleges can lead to disputes over whether officers may enter dorms or other non-public campus spaces.
---
QID: 812182
Title: Which Barcelona midfielder will be ruled out for up to six weeks with a hamstring injury by February 27, 2026?
Background: Question Start Date: 2026-02-19. Barcelona are managing player fitness during a busy part of the season. Late-February injury news could affect midfield selection for upcoming matches.
---
QID: 489902
Title: In which city will the next technical talks between Iranian and US officials be held in early March 2026?
Background: Question Start Date: 2026-02-19. Iran and the United States are holding indirect diplomatic talks through mediators over nuclear and regional security issues. A further technical meeting is expected soon after the current round.
---
QID: 811321
Title: What Turkish province will be identified by 15 March 2026 as the site of a deadly collision between a migrant boat and a coastguard vessel?
Background: Question Start Date: 2026-02-18. Migrant sea crossings near Türkiye sometimes involve encounters with maritime law-enforcement vessels. This question asks about the reported location of any such deadly collision in the coming days.
